name: claude-tiktok
description: Plays a TikTok-voice spoken summary of Claude's last message when it stops or needs your input. Replaces the usual silence / terminal bell with a short, annoying soundbite announcing what's being asked.

api_key.title: Anthropic API key
api_key.description: Used for Haiku summarization. Get one at https://console.anthropic.com and load prepaid credits — Haiku 4.5 costs ~$0.0002 per summary, so a few dollars lasts many thousands of firings. This is billed separately from your Claude Code subscription.

max_words.title: Summary length (max words)
max_words.description: Upper bound for how many words Haiku is allowed in the spoken summary. 9 gives ~3.5s of speech and is snappy; 12 gives ~5s.
